ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data record */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract being tracked */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the contract */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the contract during the period */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the contract during the period */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the contract */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of contracts traded during the period */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest at the beginning of the period */,
  "close_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest at the end of the period */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the market data */,
  "timestamp_utc" TEXT /* Timestamp in UTC */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "contract_name" TEXT /* Name of the contract */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the contract is traded */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Trading symbol of the contract */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_size" INTEGER /* Size of the contract */,
  "tick_size" REAL /* Minimum price increment for the contract */,
  "tick_value" REAL /* Monetary value of one tick */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, compliance) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the session occurs */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of trading session (e.g., regular, extended) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract related to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the detailed report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_reports_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_price" REAL /* Price level that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, deactivated) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract related to the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters for the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was created */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of trading strategy (e.g., mean reversion, momentum) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the strategy (e.g., active, paused, stopped) */,
  "last_executed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last execution of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract related to the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., volatility, average return) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the calculated metric */,
  "calculated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the metric */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
